backingType: Cash, U.S. Treasury bills, and repurchase agreements
backingDescription: BlackRock BUIDL is reported to invest all of its assets in cash, U.S. Treasury bills, and repurchase agreements, with the product categorized as U.S. Treasury Debt on RWA.xyz.
notes: Reserve asset types are sourced from the WSJ launch coverage listed in source-discovery.md and cross-checked against RWA.xyz asset class classification. RWA.xyz lists Bank of New York Mellon as custodian and PricewaterhouseCoopers as auditor. No public primary source in source-discovery.md provides exact reserve percentages, collateralization ratio, proof-of-reserves URL, attestation cadence, latest audit report URL, or last audit date; those fields remain null or empty. RWA.xyz primary-market text states USD redemptions are processed through the BUIDL fund; USD is therefore used as redemptionAsset.
